zh.Cromdale and Inverallan and Advie, Inver: 英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾可洛姆達爾 安德 音巴拉藍 安德 阿德維

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Grant 4th of Stratherrick於大約1296年出生在英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾可洛姆達爾 安德 音巴拉藍 安德 阿德維時，他的父親Sir John Grant 3rd of Stratherrick23歲，母親Agnes le Comyn35歲。他於1322年與Mary le Leche在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1296年住在英國蘇格蘭希倫德可洛姆達爾。他去世於大約1333年在蘇格蘭享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Grant 4th of Stratherrick于大约1296年出生在英国苏格兰音巴內-爾可洛姆達爾 安德 音巴拉藍 安德 阿德維时，他的父亲Sir John Grant 3rd of Stratherrick23岁，母亲Agnes le Comyn35岁。他于1322年与Mary le Leche在苏格兰音巴內-爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1296年住在英国苏格兰希倫德可洛姆達爾。他去世于大约1333年在苏格兰享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Grant
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish, English, and especially Scottish (of Norman origin): nickname from Anglo-Norman French graund, graunt ‘tall, large’ (Old French grand, grant, from Latin grandis), given either to a person of remarkable size, or else in a relative way to distinguish two bearers of the same personal name, often representatives of different generations within the same family.
English: from the rare Middle English (and Old English) personal name Grante or Grente.
Irish: in Ireland this is usually the Norman Scottish name (see 1 above), but it was also adopted for Irish Mag Raighne, see Graney .

variants.name: Graney
meanings: Irish (Galway, Cork, and Kerry): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Raighne ‘son of Raighne’, a pet form of Raghnall. It has sometimes been changed to Grant . See also Rainey .
Possibly an altered form of Swiss German Gräni, unexplained.

variants.name: Grand
meanings: French: nickname from Old French grand, grant ‘tall, large’, from Latin grandis. See also Grant 1 and 4, compare Degrand and Legrand .
German: topographic name for someone who lived in a gravelly area, from Middle Low German grand ‘coarse gravel’.
German: nickname from a southern word of uncertain origin meaning ‘frustration, anger, ire’.

variants.name: Grande
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Rocco, Domenic, Mario, Antonio, Santo, Orlando, Americo, Carmine, Gennaro, Luigi, Pasquale, Saverio, Alberico.  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Alicia, Ricardo, Jorge, Juan, Raul, Angel, Atilio.
Italian, Spanish, and Portuguese: nickname for someone of large stature, in either a literal or figurative sense, from grande ‘tall, large’.
German: habitational name from Grande in Holstein or Grand in Bavaria.

variants.name: General
meanings: African American: from the English vocabulary word general, possibly adopted as a surname in honor of a certain general of the US army, most probably Ulysses S. Grant (see Grant , compare President ). Compare also 3 below.
German: nickname for a mercenary (employed in royal services).
Hispanic (mainly Philippines): nickname from Spanish general ‘general’ (military officer).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When John Grant 4th of Stratherrick was born about 1296, in Cromdale and Inverallan and Advie, Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Grant 3rd of Stratherrick, was 23 and his mother, Agnes le Comyn, was 35. He married Mary le Leche in 1322, in Inverness-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He lived in Cromdale, Highland, Scotland, United Kingdom in 1296. He died about 1333, in Scotland, at the age of 39.

Il a épousé Mary le Leche en 1322, à Inverness-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Cromdale, Highland, Écosse, Royaume-Uni en 1296. Il est décédé environ 1333, à Écosse, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Grant 4th of Stratherrick um 1296 in Cromdale and Inverallan and Advie, Inverness-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Grant 3rd of Stratherrick 23 und seine Mutter Agnes le Comyn 35. Er hat 1322 in Inverness-shire, Scotland Mary le Leche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1296 hat er in Cromdale, Highland, Schottland, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb um 1333 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Scotland.

ko.Cromdale and Inverallan and Advie, Inver: 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르 크롬들일 앤드 인베라런 앤드 아드비
ko.lifeSummary: John Grant 4th of Stratherrick(이)가 대략 1296년 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르 크롬들일 앤드 인베라런 앤드 아드비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Grant 3rd of Stratherrick(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes le Comyn(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1322년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에서 Mary le Leche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1296년도에 영국 스코틀랜드 히그h랜드 크롬들일에서 살았다. 그는 대략 1333년 스컷랜드에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Grant 4th of Stratherrick nasceu aproximadamente 1296, em Cromdale and Inverallan and Advie, Inverness-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Grant 3rd of Stratherrick, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Agnes le Comyn, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary le Leche em 1322, em Inverness-shire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Cromdale, Highland, Escócia, United Kingdom em 1296. ru.Cromdale and Inverallan and Advie, Inver: кромдеил анд инвираллан анд адви, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Grant 4th of Stratherrick родился около 1296 г. в местности кромдеил анд инвираллан анд адви, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Grant 3rd of Stratherrick было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes le Comyn, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary le Leche в 1322 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности кромдеил, хаиланд, Шотландия, Великобритания в 1296 году. Он умер около 1333 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 39 лет.
